# maiaOS — Distributed Intelligence

> maiaOS is a brain-inspired, model-agnostic operating system for working with LLMs. A small fast frontal lobe routing to specialist cortices.

## About Knight Intelligence

maiaOS is a brain-inspired, model-agnostic operating system for working with LLMs, built by Knight Intelligence.
